headline: INCY Wins EC Approval for Label Expansion of Oncology Drug Zynyz
summary: Incyte's Zynyz wins EU approval with chemotherapy for advanced anal cancer, marking the first systemic treatment for this indication.

headline: HC Wainwright & Co. Reiterates Buy on Incyte, Maintains $135 Price Target
summary: HC Wainwright & Co.  analyst Mitchell S. Kapoor   reiterates Incyte (NASDAQ:INCY) with a Buy and maintains $135 price target.
